description: MMR gene list and known pathogenic variants for MMRd assessment

msi_thresholds.note: MSI-H: >=20% unstable markers; MSI-L: >0% but <20%; MSS: 0%

biallelic_evidence.description: Biallelic inactivation (two hits: mutation + LOH, or two mutations) strongly supports MMRd

notes: Single heterozygous MMR variants alone do NOT confirm somatic MMR deficiency
MLH1 promoter hypermethylation supports MMRd if available
IHC for MLH1/MSH2/MSH6/PMS2 recommended for Lynch syndrome screening
